ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "ticker" TEXT /* Unique ticker symbol for the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the company belongs */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country where the company is headquartered */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* The initial public offering date of the stock */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* The name of the CEO of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* The official website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on that date */,
  "dividends" REAL /* Dividends issued on that date */,
  "stock_splits" INTEGER /* Number of stock splits on that date */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for dividends and stock splits */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company on that date */,
  "volume_weighted_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) of the stock on that date */,
  "trading_day" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the day was a trading day (0 for non-trading, 1 for trading) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend payment */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Amount of the dividend paid per share */,
  "ex_dividend_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock goes ex-dividend */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date on which the dividend is recorded */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date on which the dividend is paid to shareholders */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of dividend payments (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dividends_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split event */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of the stock split (e.g., 2 for 1 split) */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "pre_split_price" REAL /* Stock price just before the split */,
  "post_split_price" REAL /* Stock price just after the split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock data */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the access was successful (0 for failure, 1 for success) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the stock */,
  "annual_return" REAL /* Annual return percentage */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "roe" REAL /* Return on equity */,
  "roa" REAL /* Return on assets */,
  "debt_to_equity" REAL /* Debt-to-equity ratio */,
  "current_ratio" REAL /* Current ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_performance_metrics_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES stocks ("ticker")
)
